response.overview: # Film Synopsis Translation  The film showcases a comedy about 3 lifelong bachelor friends who have been very close since childhood, in their efforts to find their respective life partners in their hometown. The curse "Late Circumcision, Late Marriage" frequently plays on their minds, driving them to seek their soulmates despite facing various challenges. The film also presents several elements of "adat pepatih" (customary law) and the unique Minangkabau culture of the local community in Negeri Sembilan.

production_companies.name: Tremendous Entertainment & Zebra Studio Sdn Bhd

response.title: Sinopsis Gadis Jolobu The Movie
